content.en:
The Wolf River Realm Lord even had the idea of taking down Ye Tian at this time, but he didn't dare to guarantee that Ye Tian was carrying a copy of the Duowei Treasure Bottle on his body, in case he didn't, this move would undoubtedly expose his thoughts.

So, he resisted the idea of doing it.

Moreover, there is another possibility, that is, Ye Tiannai accidentally obtained the multi-dimensional essence, in that case, it is necessary to find the channel of the multi-dimensional essence through Ye Tian, so as to lock the multi-dimensional essence imitation.

"Wolf River Realm Lord, it should be possible to trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance with this multi-dimensional essence, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Wolf River Realm Lord shook his head, "A drop of multi-dimensional essence is definitely not good, if you can come up with a multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation, our Red Wolf Family will definitely take out the Black Mist Multi-dimensional Body Inheritance!"

"The Wolf River Realm Lord said with a smile, the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance can be passed down many times, and the Duowei Treasure Bottle Imitation is such a precious thing, it is enough to make a powerful extradimensional force flourish, and its value is far from being comparable to the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance, and I don't have a Multidimensional Treasure Bottle 09 Imitation. "

Although Ye Tian didn't care about this replica body, he wouldn't tell the Lord of the Wolf River Realm truthfully, so he naturally flickered if he could.

The Wolf River Realm Lord didn't believe Ye Tian's words either, but if he couldn't do it right now, he would make a deal with Ye Tian first, and he had secretly informed the Fourth Realm of the Red Wolf Family, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord.

It is the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord who is really in charge, and the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord will do whatever he says.

"Mingze Realm Lord, I naturally know that the value of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is not as good as the imitation of the Multidimensional Treasure Bottle, but the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is still extremely precious. In this way, if you take out 500 drops of multi-dimensional essence, and it must be such a two-realm multi-dimensional essence, our Red Wolf Family will take out the Black Mist Multi-dimensional Inheritance. The Wolf River Realm Lord proposed.

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian nodded.

500 drops of multi-dimensional essence are indeed extremely precious, but he can still get it at present, after all, he has been hunting the extra-dimensional creatures of the second realm, and he has also used the multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation to condense a lot of multi-dimensional essence, and the speed of condensation still exceeds the refining speed.

Therefore, he currently has about 1,000 drops of multi-dimensional essence in storage.

However, this time he only carried more than 300 drops of multi-dimensional essence.

"Wolf River Realm Lord, I only have more than three hundred drops of multi-dimensional essence on my body now, how about exchanging more than three hundred drops of multi-dimensional essence for the Black Mist Multi-dimensional Body Inheritance first, and then giving you two hundred drops of multi-dimensional essence in the future?" Ye Tian said.

"No!" the Wolf River Realm Lord refused, "We must pay 500 drops of multi-dimensional essence at one time before we can take out the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance!"

"Wolf River Realm Lord, I don't have to be a black mist multi-dimensional body, this is a broken innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance that cuts off the hope of breaking through the fourth realm, and the difficulty of cultivation must be very high, and the super-dimensional realm that I have cultivated must be extremely rare. I took out so many multi-dimensional essences, and it was also an adventure. If it is changed to other extradimensional realms, it is impossible to trade at all. If the Red Wolf Family doesn't come up with the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance first, then I won't trade!"

Ye Tian is also threatening.

And these words undoubtedly made the Wolf River Realm Lord angry, but he still didn't make a move.

But at this moment, a terrifying force spread, making it difficult for Ye Tian to move.

"The Fourth Realm !!!"

Ye Tian was trembling all over, although he was not afraid of the Fourth Realm, but the power of this Fourth Realm was already able to cause instinctive fear in the flesh, it was really too big a gap between the two sides, and the other party could kill himself countless times in seconds with one breath!

Wow!

A figure appeared, it was an extradimensional realm with the head of a wolf and covered with red scales.

"Ancestor!"

The Wolf River Realm Lord said respectfully.

This is the fourth realm transcendent realm of the Red Wolf Family, the Dragon Wolf Realm Master, and the ancestor of the Red Wolf Family.

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord stared at Ye Tian and showed a sneer, "The second realm, you dare to negotiate conditions with our Red Wolf Family, what are you?"

Ye Tian was not afraid at all, and said: "Senior Dragon Wolf Realm Lord, I am naturally like an ant in your eyes, but if you kill me, I will destroy the multidimensional essence before I die." "

Ye Tian's power had already enveloped every drop of multi-dimensional essence in his body, and the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord naturally sensed it.

The multi-dimensional essence is just a resource, there is no defense, it can be easily destroyed or corroded, even if he can make a timely move, he can't keep all the multi-dimensional essence.

Of course.

As an existence of the Fourth Realm, he didn't care about just a few hundred drops of multidimensional essence, his target was the imitation of the multidimensional treasure bottle behind Ye Tian.

The Dragon Wolf Realm Lord commanded.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

The Dragon River Realm Lord has gone to get the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

Not long after, a Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance arrived.

"Inherit the Black Mist Multidimensional Body to me first!"

Ye Tian said.

With a wave of his hand, the Dragon River Realm Lord passed it on to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian immediately accepted the inheritance and spent some time completely fusing the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance.

"The black mist multidimensional body is so crippled?"

Ye Tian frowned.

The Lord of the Dragon River Realm said: "Naturally, it is very incomplete, the relatively complete black mist multidimensional body is attractive to the fourth realm, and it is not something that our Red Wolf Family can occupy, the black mist multidimensional body we obtained is such a crippled body." "

"Okay, then these three hundred drops of multi-dimensional essence will be given to you!"

Ye Tian took out more than three hundred drops of multi-dimensional 197 essence.

Just when the Dragon River Realm Lord took over, Ye Tian directly blew himself up and destroyed more than three hundred drops of multi-dimensional essence.

If the Red Wolf Family traded honestly, he might not have destroyed these multi-dimensional essences, but judging from the current situation, the Red Wolf Family obviously wouldn't let him go, so why would he give these multi-dimensional essences to the Red Wolf Family!

I have to say that Ye Tian's self-explosion was really unexpected by the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord and the Dragon River Realm Lord.

As the existence of the second realm, which one is willing to blow himself up?

However, after all, the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord is the Fourth Realm, and his strength is so terrifying, he suppressed the light of Ye Tian's explosion with a single thought.

The terrifying explosion was instantly compressed into a point, and then it regained its calm, without affecting the Red Wolf Family in the slightest, nor did it kill any Red Wolf Family members.

"Why does this guy dare to blow himself up?"

The Dragon River Realm Lord didn't understand.

"Maybe it's a clone!" guessed the Dragon Wolf Realm Lord.

The Dragon River Realm Lord still didn't understand, "Ancestor, even if the other party is a clone, it is obviously not cost-effective to lose a second realm clone plus hundreds of drops of multi-dimensional essence!"

"No, if the other party is sure to practice into a black mist multi-dimensional body, then it will be a good deal!"
